description: Composition Black shorts made of 100% polyester, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring, grey panel detailing on the sides extending to the back, zippered pocket on the back and printed branding on the left hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Built with breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of shorts from puma comes in a sophisticated body-friendly design. This high-performance shorts created from polyester fabric wicks sweat away and keeps you cool, dry and comfortable. Team it with a T-shirt and performance shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
